prediction_ref.short_label: Secret leakage through CI / agents becomes the next battleground ("Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration" rises to OWASP top)

validation_rows.evidence_summary: The Hacker News writeup of Nginx UI CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn) details how an empty default IP allowlist on /mcp_message lets two HTTP requests fully take over the host, exposing 12 unauthenticated MCP tool calls — a structural CI / agent-adjacent path where credentials are reachable, but no fresh OWASP / CIS top-list entry naming Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration as a category lands inside the window.

bridge.remaining_gap: Need an explicit CIS or OWASP top-list entry naming Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration as a category, not only adjacent CVE coverage.
